data.name: HeroDesc
data.value: I'm a computer science student and a software developer specializing in building scalable applications and REST APIs. Currently, my main focus is developing reliable architectures using .NET Core, C#, and Entity Framework. I am actively looking for a summer internship opportunity.

data.name: CinemaDesc
data.value: A multi-layer REST API for movie theater operations, built strictly following Clean Architecture principles to ensure high maintainability.

data.name: EsportsDesc
data.value: A web application for managing esports tournaments, featuring custom role-based access control and automated local database migrations.

data.name: AiDesc
data.value: A containerized backend application that integrates with external AI models via the Hugging Face API to process and analyze data.

data.name: TricityDesc
data.value: A recommendation system designed to suggest optimal trail routes across the Tricity area based on user preferences and terrain parameters.

data.name: DjangoDesc
data.value: A library management web application built with Django. It handles book inventories, user checkouts, and administrative tasks.

data.name: AisdDesc
data.value: Implementations of fundamental algorithms and complex data structures, including custom priority queues and Huffman compression.

data.name: OopDesc
data.value: A collection of academic assignments demonstrating core Object-Oriented Programming principles and design patterns.

data.name: ContactDesc
data.value: I'm currently looking for a summer internship and new opportunities. Whether you have a question regarding my projects or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
